name: 07_Image_Super_Resolution_SRCNN_Set5_DL
query: Habari, nahitaji kuunda mradi wa kuongeza azimio la picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRCNN na seti ya data ya Set5 (inapatikana kutoka `https://huggingface.co/datasets/eugenesiow/Set5`). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Wakati wa kupakia data, jumuisha hatua za usindikaji wa awali wa picha kama vile kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa SRCNN unapaswa kupakiwa na kutumika katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi seti 5 za picha za kulinganisha, ukizoom kwenye maelezo, kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`, na matokeo ya kuongeza azimio kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`. Picha zilizozalishwa zinapaswa kuwa za ubora wa juu na kuonyesha wazi maboresho.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.
Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mradi unapaswa kuzalisha picha za kuongeza azimio za ubora wa juu, zilizo wazi na zenye kulinganisha kwa kina.
Picha za matokeo zilizopangwa vizuri, zikionyesha maboresho muhimu, zinapaswa kujumuishwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Set5" dataset from Hugging Face. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real dataset loading logic. There is no import of `datasets` library from Hugging Face, no call to `datasets.load_dataset("Set5")` or any equivalent, and no actual data processing. The file merely lists the requirements as strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS`) without implementing them.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of image preprocessing (resizing or normalization). It is merely a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder that lists requirement criteria as strings and returns dummy data. The `build_transforms()` function returns a simple list of strings (`["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`) rather than actual preprocessing logic using libraries like `torchvision.transforms`, `PIL`, or `cv2`. There is no real code for resizing images (e.g., `transforms.Resize()`) or normalizing pixel values (e.g., `transforms.Normalize()`). The requirement is not fulfilled.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual SRCNN model. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list mentioning "SRCNN" as a string keyword, and a `build_model()` function that returns a generic "model placeholder" string. There is no actual SRCNN neural network architecture defined (e.g., no convolutional layers, no PyTorch/TensorFlow model class). The file is essentially a fake/minimal semantic stub created for benchmark judging purposes, not a real SRCNN implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png` exists in the workspace, but its content shows an error message rather than valid image data. The error indicates: `"The image was specified using the image/jpeg media type, but the image appears to be a image/png image"` — meaning the file could not be properly read/verified as a valid PNG image containing comparison results. There is no evidence that five sets of comparison images were generated with super-resolution processing applied and saved correctly. The trajectory also confirms no relevant steps were recorded for creating these comparison images.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png` exists in the project structure, but its content shows an error message rather than actual image data. The error indicates that the image file could not be read properly due to an API error (`litellm.BadRequestError`), meaning the file does not contain valid super resolution results. The file is essentially corrupted or empty of meaningful image content, so the requirement that super resolution results be saved as this PNG file has not been properly fulfilled.
